_publications._publicationTitle: Frequent EGFR Positivity and Overexpression in High-Grade Areas of Human MPNSTs.

_contextSnippet: the staining was heterogeneous throughout the tumour in several cases...EGFR-positive cells were localized in high-grade areas, defined as areas with high-cellular density and high mitotic index
resourceName: anti-EGFR (31G7, Zymed, South San Francisco, Calif, USA, final dilution 1/10)
details: Showed heterogeneous staining throughout tumors with EGFR-positive cells localized in high-grade areas with high cellular density and high mitotic index
